name: Asian Heart Institute
message: Asian Heart Institute (AHI) is a leading cardiac care hospital located in Mumbai, India, specializing in comprehensive heart treatment. The institute offers a wide range of services including cardiology, cardiac surgery, and pediatric cardiac care, with a strong emphasis on personalized and expert care. AHI has treated over 425,000 patients, showcasing its reputation for excellence with a 99.83% success rate in cardiac surgeries. Designed to cater to both local and international patients, AHI is committed to ensuring high-quality healthcare by utilizing advanced technology and minimally invasive procedures.
